issue.title: www.kohls.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.kohls.com/myaccount/dashboard](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kohls.com%2Fmyaccount%2Fdashboard) ### Comment > The button to "proceed to checkout" was unresponsive but eventually worked after several page refreshes. Then the button on the next page to place my order during checkout process was not responsive and simply showed a spinning circle. Disabling only Adguard and refreshing again made the problem go away and allowed me to place my order. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/7at7rr2x2ao0884k0c448c8wks0g4wk2cogylw6ahe.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3vyb8bb61hk4k8ksssksgkk8skokk00dci2ckljbko.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2mikkeszzl6ogg08ocgk00wg8ww8owofcd4zmklq4o.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.89 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-07-06T09:00:46Z Other extensions used: | `uBlock Origin Lite` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.89&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C3%2C10&filters_last_update=2026-07-06T09%3A00%3A46Z&stealth.enabled=0)

issue.title: totalwar.fandom.com

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: @Alex-302 seems to be resolved now, after updating my hagezi filter, the issue no longer persist 🙏
